notableEvents.label: Eugenio Suárez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Eugenio Suárez homers (2) on a fly ball to left field. Sal Stewart scores.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers singles on a line drive to center fielder Oneil Cruz.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers flies out to right fielder Jake Mangum.

notableEvents.label: Jared Triolo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jared Triolo grounds into a double play, first baseman Sal Stewart to second baseman Matt McLain. Nick Yorke out at 2nd. Jared Triolo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Henry Davis plunked
notableEvents.detail: Henry Davis hit by pitch. Spencer Horwitz to 2nd.
